title: Money in the Household Is Shared. Money in My Hands Is Mine.
subtitle: An energy statement for releasing the habit of treating a partner's income as off-limits, and allowing a full and autonomous relationship with the money you share
excerpt: A short energy statement for the stuck-on feeling of financial smallness within a partnership. The release names the habit of treating shared income as belonging to someone else; the allow names the autonomy that is yours within a life built together.
sourceNotes: Original energy statement written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow framework is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for the feeling that a partner's income is not fully yours to use. The release names the habit of treating shared money as off-limits without permission; the allow names the financial autonomy that is yours to claim within a partnership.

I am ready to release every habit of treating shared money as belonging to someone else, and every pattern of asking permission for what is already mine. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.

I am ready to align with and allow a full, autonomous relationship with the money in my life, knowing that financial partnership is shared ownership, and the money in my hands is mine to use with confidence. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Written for homemade.education. The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
